name: Kentucky Cabinet for Health and Family Services - Department for Behavioral Health, Developmental and Intellectual Disabilities
description: State agency providing services and supports for Kentuckians with developmental and intellectual disabilities including waiver programs and community services.

name: Kentucky Early Intervention System (First Steps)
description: Part C early intervention program providing developmental services for infants and toddlers birth to age 3 with developmental delays or disabilities.

name: The Arc of Kentucky
description: Statewide advocacy organization for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities, providing resources, support, and policy advocacy.

name: Special Olympics Kentucky
description: Year-round sports training and athletic competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities throughout Kentucky.

name: Kentucky Protection and Advocacy (Disability Rights Kentucky)
description: Federally designated protection and advocacy organization providing legal advocacy for Kentuckians with disabilities.

name: Kentucky Lifespan Respite Project
description: Respite care resources and referrals for family caregivers of individuals with disabilities or special needs across Kentucky.

name: Camp KYSOC (Kentucky Sheriffs' Boys and Girls Ranch)
description: Summer camp program for children with disabilities and special needs in a supportive outdoor environment.

name: Kentucky Assistive Technology Service (KATS) Network
description: Kentucky's assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, equipment loans, and AT training for individuals with disabilities.

name: Kentucky ABLE Account (STABLE KY)
description: Tax-advantaged savings accounts enabling Kentuckians with disabilities to save without impacting eligibility for public benefits.

name: Kentucky Medicaid Waiver Programs (Michelle P. Waiver / SCL Waiver)
description: Home and community-based Medicaid waiver programs for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities to receive services in their communities.

name: TARC3 Paratransit (Louisville)
description: Paratransit transportation service for individuals with disabilities in the Louisville metro area.

name: Kentucky Housing Corporation - Accessible Housing
description: State housing finance agency providing resources for accessible and affordable housing options for Kentuckians with disabilities.

name: University of Louisville Developmental Pediatrics - Weisskopf Child Evaluation Center
description: Comprehensive developmental evaluations, diagnosis, and treatment for children with developmental disabilities and concerns.

name: Cardinal Hill Rehabilitation Hospital Pediatric Therapy
description: Pediatric rehabilitation and therapy services including physical, occupational, and speech therapy for children with disabilities.

name: Kentucky Office of Vocational Rehabilitation - Employment
description: State vocational rehabilitation program providing employment services, job training, and placement for Kentuckians with disabilities.
